_comment: breakdown-improvement-plan M3.1 hook manifest. 5 breakdown-specific hooks plus pending_recheck reuse from prd template. install pipeline materializes the listed scripts under .claude/hooks/breakdown/ and merges the matcher entries into .claude/settings.json hooks.

hooks.purpose: Block direct Write/Edit of execution-brief.contract.yaml; must use harness contract fill/patch/add-execution-result.
Forbid writing execution-brief.md without atomic_task_queue ready/accepted for every Parent task (plan §2.7 first-write completeness HARD-GATE).
Reject harness writing-plans run outside breakdown stage or without --mode internal-carrier.
Block stage advance until both delivery-slicer and test-planning-expert have DONE entries in execution_results[] (parallel-worker barrier).
Block `harness mission stage complete breakdown` until execution-brief gate run last_gate_run_status=PASS.
Set execution-brief.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true after execution-brief.md edit so the pre-advance hook fires.
Block harness gate/contract advance while execution-brief.contract.yaml carries pending_reviewer_recheck=true.
